title: What It Actually Looks Like to Want a Wife and Not Need One
caption:
What it actually looks like for a godly man to want a wife and not need one.

Desperate prayer sounds like negotiating. Content prayer sounds like a man who already has what he needs and is asking for more. If your peace depends on a text back, you've made her a savior, and she was never built to carry that.

Chase the man God's building whether or not you're chasing Him alone this year. The right woman meets that man, not the waiting one.

Want her. Just don't need her to complete the sentence. Desire isn't the problem. Desperation is.

#faith #singleness #christianmen #manofgod #relationships #patience
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
